meta.title: Comparing Government Approaches To Critical Infrastructure Security
meta.description:
Miguel Garcia-Menendez of CCI gives the S4x18 audience a sneak peak of the study they did on how government's around the world are addressing ICS cybersecurity for critical infrastructure.

The conclusions and key points from the study start at 11:15.
